message.content:
I can’t see the actual text of your story in your message—just the placeholder “[story]”. To give you real feedback, I’d need the full text pasted in.

If you’re comfortable, send the story (or even just an excerpt), and I’ll focus on:

- What’s working especially well (voice, imagery, character, emotion, etc.)
- Any only-truly-catastrophic issues, if there are any—which I’ll phrase as gently and constructively as possible

If you’re nervous, you can start with just the opening paragraph or a single scene, and we can go from there.
